zh.lifeSummary: 當Tristan de Vitré於1003年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯時，他的父親Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy23歲，母親Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire33歲。他於1030年與Enoguen Rennes在法國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1050年之前在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vitré
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Vetro

nameMeanings.name: Tristan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Celtic legend, the name borne by a hero of medieval romance. There are many different versions of the immensely popular tragic story of Tristan and his love for Isolde. Generally, they agree that Tristan was an envoy sent by King Mark of Cornwall to bring back his bride, the Irish princess Isolde. Unfortunately, Tristan and Isolde fall in love with each other, having accidentally drunk the love potion intended for King Mark's wedding night. Tristan eventually leaves Cornwall to fight for King Howel of Brittany . Wounded in battle, he sends for Isolde. She arrives too late, and dies of grief beside his bier. The name Tristan is of unknown derivation, though it may be connected with Pictish Drostan; it has been altered from an irrecoverable original as a result of transmission through Old French sources that insisted on associating it with Latin tristis ‘sad’, a reference to the young knight's tragic fate.

en.lifeSummary: When Tristan de Vitré was born in 1003, in Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy, was 23 and his mother, Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire, was 33. He married Enoguen Rennes in 1030, in France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died before 1050, in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Tristan de Vitré est né en 1003, à Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Enoguen Rennes en 1030, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé avant 1050, à Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Tristan de Vitré 1003 in Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy 23 und seine Mutter Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire 33. Er hat 1030 in Frankreich Enoguen Rennes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb vor 1050 in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich.

Lui sposato Enoguen Rennes nel 1030, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì prima del 1050, nel Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.

ko.Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Fran: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 메이니
ko.lifeSummary: Tristan de Vitré(이)가 1003년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 렌스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1030년 프랑스에서 Enoguen Rennes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1050년 이전 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비트e에서 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Enoguen Rennes em 1030, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1050, em Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tristan de Vitré родился в 1003 г. в местности реннесь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Riwallon de Vitré, Vicarius de Vitré, Lord of Vitré and Aubroy было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Génergaude d'Aubrey de la Vicaire, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Enoguen Rennes в 1030 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер перед 1050 г. в местности витрe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция.
